description: You are an environmental planner who needs to create a preliminary land cover classification map from multi-spectral satellite imagery. Using ESA SNAP, perform an unsupervised K-Means cluster analysis on the 4-band Landsat image located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Configure the analysis with 5 clusters and 30 iterations, including all available source bands. Save the resulting classified product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_kmeans_classified and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_kmeans_classified.tif.
